series_metadata.series_title: Maintenance Contracts Files for Equipment Repair
series_metadata.series_description: The Maintenance Contracts Files for Equipment Repair include contracts and warranties for data processing equipment, and related records for the repair of equipment including copies of contracts, service histories, and work orders. Reference general schedule IT-OP-03.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: sale of goods, five years contract expires, and GAR-C-03. ; Electronic: sale of goods, five years contract expires, and GAR-C-03
